gist.headline: Laying down the tiles
gist.blurb: TileTile just dropped into the greenhouse. It uses Flux Schnell to generate seamless repeating textures, perfect for when you need a background that never ends.
gist.summary: Added TileTile, a seamless texture generator powered by Flux Schnell, to the community app showcase.
gist.impact: Creators can now discover TileTile in the greenhouse to easily generate repeating textures for games, art, and backgrounds.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee wearing a tiny tool belt, arranging perfectly matching square tiles on the ground to create a seamless pattern in a cozy garden setting.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny tool belt, carefully laying down perfectly matching square tiles to build a seamless garden path. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
